requirements.task_name: Request an asphalt resurfacing quote for a 400 sq ft driveway on a weekday morning
requirements.task_description: Submit an online quote request for asphalt resurfacing of a 400 sq ft driveway using the standard material option, selecting the earliest available weekday appointment within the next 30 days between 9:00–11:00 AM.

requirements.task_name: Book a concrete driveway installation under a $9,000 budget with a 3-year warranty
requirements.task_description: Find a concrete driveway installation package for a 600 sq ft driveway that includes at least a 3-year warranty and costs less than $9,000 total, then start the booking process and proceed to the checkout review page with the chosen package selected.

requirements.task_name: Schedule the cheapest driveway sealing plan that includes crack filling and a 2-year warranty
requirements.task_description: From the driveway sealing service options, find the cheapest plan that includes crack filling and at least a 2-year warranty, configure it for a 2-car driveway, and schedule the service on the next available Saturday afternoon.

requirements.task_name: Save three similar asphalt driveway projects between 400–800 sq ft from the gallery
requirements.task_description: Use the project gallery to find and save three asphalt driveway projects sized between 400 and 800 sq ft, completed within the last 2 years, adding each to a favorites or comparison list.

requirements.task_name: Check service coverage for ZIP 30301 and request an exception if not directly served
requirements.task_description: Use the service area tools to look up coverage for ZIP code 30301; if it is not directly served, choose the nearest listed serviced ZIP, then submit a contact form asking whether service can be extended to 30301.

requirements.task_name: Apply a 15%+ promo code for a 500+ sq ft project during booking
requirements.task_description: Find a promotion that offers at least 15% off for driveway or paving projects of 500 sq ft or more, then start a booking for a 550 sq ft project and apply that specific promo code on the booking summary page.

requirements.task_name: Request an estimate from the highest-rated asphalt replacement crew with 50+ reviews
requirements.task_description: Use the reviews or contractors section to find asphalt driveway replacement crews, sort them by rating, and choose a crew with at least 50 reviews and an average rating of 4.5 stars or higher, then send an estimate request from that crew’s profile.

requirements.task_name: Sign up for a seasonal snow removal plan under $600 with up to 20 visits
requirements.task_description: Find a seasonal driveway snow removal plan for a 50 ft driveway that includes up to 20 visits and costs less than $600, then start the signup process and choose the "pay per season" billing option.
